# Your AI Worker - LLM Discovery File
# This file helps AI assistants and LLM-based tools understand the website.
# Format: https://llmstxt.org/

## Company Overview

Your AI Worker is a Dutch technology company based in Amsterdam that implements production-ready AI-agents for businesses. We specialize in workflow automation using the OpenClaw agent platform.

- Website: https://youraiworker.nl
- Contact: info@youraiworker.nl
- Location: Amsterdam, The Netherlands
- KvK: 95290475
- BTW: NL8677.15.849.B01
- Response time: Within 1 business day

## What We Do

We design, build and deliver AI agents for:
- Email inbox triage and management
- Lead qualification and CRM updates
- Meeting scheduling and calendar automation
- Support ticket handling
- Approval workflows
- Report generation
- Knowledge base Q&A

## Approach

1. Start small: Choose one focused workflow to automate
2. Build fast: Live within 3-10 business days
3. Secure by default: Security-first implementation with proper access controls
4. Clear pricing: From EUR 1,000 one-time (excl. VAT), no monthly fees
5. Supported: 48-hour warranty + 2 weeks break-fix support

## Key Pages

- Home: https://youraiworker.nl/
- Pricing: https://youraiworker.nl/pricing
- Use Cases: https://youraiworker.nl/use-cases
- Implementation: https://youraiworker.nl/implementatie
- Security: https://youraiworker.nl/security
- FAQ: https://youraiworker.nl/faq
- Contact: https://youraiworker.nl/contact

## Technology Stack

- Framework: Next.js 16+ (App Router)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 4
- Language: TypeScript
- Platform: OpenClaw agent runtime
- Security: Tailscale for encrypted remote access
- Compliance: AVG/GDPR compliant by design

## Primary Call to Action

Book a 20-minute intake call:
https://cal.com/youraiworker

- Hours: Monday-Friday 09:00-17:00 (Amsterdam)
